a.xlink:title: Utility functions for color fill, palettes, blending, and more.
Defines the 8-bit red, green, and blue (RGB) pixel type in the fl namespace.
Wrapper definitions to allow seamless use of PROGMEM in environments that have it.
Centralized logging categories for FastLED hardware interfaces and subsystems.
Unsigned alpha types with UNORM semantics (GPU industry standard).
FastLED chrono implementation - duration types for time measurements.
FastLED ratio implementation - compile-time rational arithmetic.
